code:
import io
import string
import list

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for x in nums
    mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for y in sorted
      if not inserted and x <= y
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
    end
    if not inserted
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
    end
    sorted = new_sorted
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
